creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Michael, hello Eric, hello John,

there hasn't been any update on this PR (see [1]) for the port
net/nss_ldap for quite a while. What is the state of things here? Does the
problem still exist, or should this PR be closed?

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166987
